raw_extraction.job_title: Senior AI Engineer — Founding Team, Redrob AI
raw_extraction.role_mandate: Own intelligence layer of Redrob's product, ranking and retrieval systems
must_have_requirements: production embeddings-based retrieval deployed to real users — sentence-transformers, BGE, or OpenAI embeddings
production experience with vector databases or hybrid search infrastructure — Pinecone, Weaviate, or similar
hands-on experience designing evaluation frameworks for ranking systems — NDCG, MRR, MAP, offline-to-online correlation
strong Python skills with focus on code quality and production deployment experience
raw_extraction.ideal_candidate_profile: Applied ML/AI professional with 6-8 years experience, 4-5 in product companies
nice_to_have: LLM fine-tuning experience with LoRA or QLoRA
experience with learning-to-rank models like XGBoost
prior exposure to HR-tech or recruiting tech products
hard_disqualifiers: pure research background with no production deployment experience
recent AI experience limited to LangChain-to-OpenAI projects
senior engineers without recent production code experience
primary expertise in computer vision, speech, or robotics without NLP/IR exposure

jd_queries: production embeddings-based retrieval deployed to real users — sentence-transformers, BGE, or OpenAI embeddings
production experience with vector databases or hybrid search infrastructure — Pinecone, Weaviate, or similar
hands-on experience designing evaluation frameworks for ranking systems — NDCG, MRR, MAP, offline-to-online correlation
strong Python skills with focus on code quality and production deployment experience
Applied ML/AI professional with 6-8 years experience, 4-5 in product companies
rerank_jd_text:
Senior AI Engineer — Founding Team, Redrob AI.
Own intelligence layer of Redrob's product, ranking and retrieval systems
Must have: production embeddings-based retrieval deployed to real users — sentence-transformers, BGE, or OpenAI embeddings; production experience with vector databases or hybrid search infrastructure — Pinecone, Weaviate, or similar; hands-on experience designing evaluation frameworks for ranking systems — NDCG, MRR, MAP, offline-to-online correlation; strong Python skills with focus on code quality and production deployment experience.
Reject: pure research background with no production deployment experience; recent AI experience limited to LangChain-to-OpenAI projects; senior engineers without recent production code experience; primary expertise in computer vision, speech, or robotics without NLP/IR exposure.
Nice to have: LLM fine-tuning experience with LoRA or QLoRA; experience with learning-to-rank models like XGBoost; prior exposure to HR-tech or recruiting tech products.
